name: SIGPAC - Agricultural Parcels Geographic Information System
operator: FEGA (Fondo Espanol de Garantia Agraria) / Ministry of Agriculture
dataType: Agricultural parcel boundaries, land use, crop eligibility, CAP reference parcels
description: Spain's national Land Parcel Identification System (LPIS) providing georeferenced agricultural parcel boundaries overlaid on orthophotos for CAP subsidy management, with over 1 million parcels.

name: REDIAM - Red de Informacion Ambiental de Andalucia
operator: Junta de Andalucia - Consejeria de Sostenibilidad, Medio Ambiente y Economia Azul
dataType: Biodiversity, forests, protected areas, land use, water, soils, climate, environmental quality
formats: Shapefile, GeoTIFF, GeoPackage, ECW, web viewer
description: Andalusia's comprehensive environmental information network providing over 4500 datasets and 2000 interoperable geographic services on biodiversity, forests, water, land use and environmental quality.

name: SNCZI - Sistema Nacional de Cartografia de Zonas Inundables
operator: MITECO (Ministerio para la Transicion Ecologica y el Reto Demografico)
dataType: Flood zone maps, hazard maps, risk maps, dam and reservoir inventory
temporalResolution: periodic updates (6-year cycle per EU Floods Directive)
description: Spain's national flood zone cartography system providing flood hazard and risk maps for 10, 100 and 500-year return periods, plus dam and reservoir inventory, under the EU Floods Directive.

name: IEO-CSIC - Instituto Espanol de Oceanografia Data
dataType: Oceanographic observations, marine biodiversity, fisheries data, bathymetry, water temperature, salinity
description: Spain's national oceanographic institute data catalogue providing marine observations, fisheries surveys, bathymetry and environmental monitoring data from research cruises and coastal stations since 1914.

name: SAIH - Sistema Automatico de Informacion Hidrologica
dataType: Real-time river levels, flows, rainfall, reservoir levels, flood alerts
formats: Web viewer, CSV exports per basin authority
description: Spain's automatic hydrological information system providing real-time river level, flow, rainfall and reservoir data across all river basin confederations for flood warning and water resource management.

name: CHJ SIA Jucar - Confederacion Hidrografica del Jucar
dataType: Water bodies, monitoring networks, protected areas, flood zones, water quality, ecological status
description: Jucar River Basin authority geoportal providing water body delineation, monitoring data, flood zone cartography, ecological status and water resource planning for eastern Spain.

name: Skogsstyrelsen - Swedish Forest Agency Open Forest Data
dataType: Forest attribute maps (height, volume, biomass, age), key biotopes, forest damage, cultural heritage
description: Sweden's national forest attribute maps derived from airborne laser scanning and field inventory, plus valuable forest habitats, forest damage geodata and cultural heritage sites in forests.

name: Jordbruksverket - Swedish Agricultural Parcels (LPIS)
dataType: Agricultural block boundaries, field blocks, pasture blocks, crop declarations
description: Sweden's LPIS agricultural block database containing approximately 1.1 million blocks covering 3.2 million hectares of arable and pasture land, used for CAP subsidy administration.

name: HaV - Swedish Agency for Marine and Water Management Geodata
operator: Havs- och vattenmyndigheten (Swedish Agency for Marine and Water Management)
dataType: Marine protected areas, water body status, marine spatial plans, bathymetry, water quality
description: Swedish marine and freshwater management authority providing geodata on marine spatial plans, protected marine areas, water body ecological status and coastal zone management.

name: SLU Riksskogstaxeringen - Swedish National Forest Inventory
dataType: Forest statistics (volume, growth, area, tree species), vegetation, soil carbon, dead wood
description: Sweden's century-old national forest inventory with 100-year time series from annual sampling of 12000 plots, providing official statistics on forest state, growth and environmental indicators via Taxwebb.

name: VISS - Vatteninformationssystem Sverige (Water Information System Sweden)
dataType: Water body classification, ecological and chemical status, pressures, environmental objectives
description: Sweden's national Water Framework Directive information system cataloguing the ecological and chemical status of all surface and groundwater bodies with classification, pressures and environmental quality objectives.

name: Luke Open Data - Natural Resources Institute Finland
dataType: Forest inventory statistics, agricultural statistics, fisheries, game management, food sector data
description: Finland's national natural resources research institute open data portal providing official statistics on agriculture, forestry, fisheries, game and food sectors with long time series.

name: Traficom Hydrographic Open Data - Nautical Charts and Depths
dataType: Nautical charts, bathymetry, depth data, coastal features, navigational aids
description: Finnish hydrographic open data including nautical chart vector data, depth models and coastal features provided by Traficom through download and OGC web services.

name: Museovirasto - Finnish Heritage Agency Spatial Data
dataType: Archaeological sites, built heritage, protected buildings, cultural landscapes, world heritage sites
description: Finnish Heritage Agency spatial datasets of protected archaeological sites, built heritage environments and cultural landscapes downloadable as GeoPackage or via WMS/WFS services.

name: TUKES Mining Register Geodata
dataType: Mining permits, exploration permits, reservation areas, gold panning permits, mining concessions
description: Finnish mining authority geodata providing boundaries of active mining permits, exploration permits, reservation areas and gold panning permits as downloadable GIS files.

name: Metsahallitus - State Lands and Protected Areas Geodata
dataType: National parks, nature reserves, Natura 2000 sites, hiking trails, state forest lands, habitat data
description: Geographic information on Finland's 41 national parks, nature reserves and state-owned land and water areas managed by Metsahallitus through the Uljas GIS system.

name: GeoDanmark - Nationwide Geographic Cooperation
dataType: Buildings, roads, waterways, land cover, orthophotos, oblique photos (Skrafotos), 3D city models
temporalResolution: annual orthophoto updates; continuous vector updates
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, GML, GeoTIFF, web viewer
description: Denmark's nationwide municipal-state geographic cooperation providing topographic base data, annual orthophotos, oblique aerial photos (Skrafotos) and 3D city models as free open data.

name: DCE - Danish Centre for Environment and Energy (Aarhus University)
dataType: Air quality, nature monitoring (NOVANA), marine monitoring, biodiversity assessments, basemaps
temporalResolution: varies (hourly air quality to 6-year NOVANA cycle)
formats: CSV, Excel, PDF reports, web viewer
description: Aarhus University centre running Denmark's NOVANA environmental monitoring programme across eight subprogrammes covering air quality, groundwater, streams, lakes, marine waters, species and habitats.

name: Danish Agriculture Agency - Agricultural Parcels (LPIS)
dataType: Field block boundaries, crop type declarations, organic farming parcels, Natura 2000 agricultural areas
description: Denmark's LPIS field block map providing digitized boundaries of all agricultural parcels nationwide with annual crop declarations, used for CAP subsidy management.

name: Miljostyrelsen Environmental Data and MiljoGIS Downloads
dataType: Groundwater protection zones, noise maps, contaminated sites, Natura 2000, water plans, waste facilities
description: Danish Environmental Protection Agency downloadable GIS datasets from MiljoGIS covering groundwater protection, noise mapping, contaminated sites, Natura 2000 plans and water environment regulation.

name: Skraafoto - Denmark Oblique Aerial Photos
dataType: Oblique aerial photographs from four cardinal directions covering all Denmark
description: Denmark's nationwide free oblique aerial photo service showing buildings and landscapes from four angles, making Denmark the first country to provide such imagery as fully open data.

name: Artsdatabanken - Norwegian Biodiversity Information Centre
dataType: Species occurrence records, red lists, alien species, nature types, species identification keys
formats: CSV, Darwin Core Archive, web viewer
description: Norway's national species data bank with over 23 million occurrence records of 34000+ species, providing species maps, red lists, alien species assessments and nature type classifications.

name: BarentsWatch - Norwegian Coastal and Marine Information
dataType: AIS vessel traffic, aquaculture sites, sea lice, fish health, polar lows, ocean currents, fishery activity
license: NLOD (Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data)
description: Norwegian coastal and marine monitoring portal aggregating data from 29 agencies on vessel traffic (AIS), aquaculture, fisheries, sea conditions and polar weather for maritime situational awareness.

name: Sokkeldirektoratet (Norwegian Offshore Directorate) - FactPages and FactMaps
dataType: Wellbores, fields, discoveries, production licences, seismic surveys, production data, facilities
description: Norwegian continental shelf petroleum data including daily-updated wellbore, field, discovery and production licence information with interactive FactMaps and downloadable datasets under NLOD.

name: NIBIO Kilden - Norwegian Agricultural and Landscape Map Portal
dataType: AR5 land resource map, soil maps, forest resource maps, landscape regions, reindeer herding areas
description: NIBIO's interactive map portal presenting Norway's AR5 land resource classification, detailed agricultural soil surveys, forest inventory data, landscape types and reindeer herding districts.

name: Havforskningsinstituttet - Institute of Marine Research Geodata
dataType: Spawning grounds, fish survey data, oceanographic CTD profiles, seafood contaminants, aquaculture environmental data
formats: GeoJSON, KML, GML, CSV, web viewer
description: Norway's largest marine research institute providing geodata on coastal fish spawning grounds, stock surveys, oceanographic observations and seafood safety data through the Norwegian Marine Data Centre.
